prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续高位，与该校招生专业匹配度高；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），考生 规模显著扩大，竞争压力上升。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 54552 → 20926 → 19298 → 14358 → 32070. In 2021, there was significant fluctuation due to the first new college entrance examination reform. From 2022 to 2024, rankings moved forward year by year (decreasing numbers). In 2025, due to Shaanxi's first implementation of the "3+1+2" new college entrance examination model, the division of major groups caused the minimum ranking to shift back to 32070. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 32070. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Shaanxi was 127 in 2021, 131 in 2022, 135 in 2023, 135 in 2024, and 136 in 2025, showing a slight increasing trend. In 2026, the plan is 123, a decrease of 13 (about -9.6%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 74th, with recent rankings stable in the 69–78 range. The university's comprehensive strength is at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is generally positive. Sports achievements such as the men's volleyball team winning the championship have increased the university's exposure. It ranks 43rd in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with high attention on short video platforms. In 2023, there were discussions about admission score lines compared to 985 universities, but no significant record gaps were observed. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top nationally). Medical fields (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc.) and Materials Science are relatively strong, attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, matching well with the university's enrollment majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025. The examinee scale has significantly expanded, increasing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 32070 under the new college entrance examination model in 2025, the planned enrollment reduction of about 9.6% in 2026, and the significant increase of about 19.7% in local Physics Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward (decreasing number) compared to 2025. However, the combined effects of enrollment reduction and examinee increase will result in a slight upward shift. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 30730, with a range of 30230–31230.

Food Science and Engineering, as the university's A+ flagship discipline, offers high cost-performance and is suitable for examinees interested in the food field.
